steps.title: Read two points from the line of best fit
steps.content: From the scatterplot, the line of best fit slopes downward (a negative slope). Two readable points are approximately $(0, 12)$ and $(10, 1)$.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: $-3.3$ — far too steep; the line drops about $11$ units over $10$ units, not $33$. Eliminate.
  • Choice B: $-1.1$ — matches the rise-over-run calculation.
  • Choice C: $1.1$ — correct magnitude but the line clearly slopes downward, so slope must be negative. Eliminate.
  • Choice D: $3.3$ — wrong magnitude and wrong sign. Eliminate.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
